LanguageData.PsychoHigh.label: high on psycho
LanguageData.PsychoHigh.description: Active psycho in the bloodstream. Generates a very intense euphoric high.
LanguageData.PsychoCrash.label: psycho crash
LanguageData.PsychoCrash.description: A very unpleasant delayed after-effect of psycho intake.
LanguageData.PsychoCrash.stages.0.label: recovering
LanguageData.PsychoCrash.stages.1.label: major
LanguageData.PsychoCrash.stages.2.label: initial
